facts.text: 北京航空航天大学国际学院 Chinese Version English Version 切换导航 Home News Notice Window of Beihang Download Academic Calendar Orientation Campus Map Online Application About Us 10 Reasons for Studying at Beihang Schools & Colleges International School Offices Admissions Undergraduate Foundation + Bachelor Postgraduate Visiting Scholar/Exchange Programs Student in Chinese Language Training Winter Camp-Fly Chinese Program International Summer School Scholarships Chinese Government Scholarship-Bilateral Program Chinese Government Scholarship-High-level Postgraduates Program at Beihang University Youth of Excellence Scheme of China Program Chinese Government Scholarship Chinese Government Scholarship-Belt & Road Program Chinese Government Scholarship China Link Program International Chinese Language Teachers Scholarship Beijing Government Foreign Students Scholarship Beihang University Foreign Students Scholarship Campus Life Visa and Residence Permit Medical Treatment and Insurance International Student Dormitory International Student Associations Gallery & Videos Internship Employment Information Alumni Contact Us Welcome To Beihang University Admissions Information view more Application view more Scholarships view more Download view more News 2025 Annual Review | My Moments at Beihang: Pursuing Technological Brilliance, Innovating for a Smart Future 2026-01-23 --> 2025 Annual Review | My Moments at Beihang: Boundless Culture, Flourishing Artistry 2026-01-12 --> Beihang University holds 2025 International Student Award Ceremony & 2026 New Year Gala 2026-01-06 --> This is Beihang Notices Nov 20 Notice on Distinguished International Students Scholarship Application 2025 Distinguished International Students Scholarship Application 2025 is open now.

Please get the detailed information in the column “Scholarships” of the website of the International School (http://is.buaa.edu.cn).Distinguished International Students Scholarship Application 2025 will be completed through online application and review, and students do not need to submit the paper materials.

Sep 10 Notice on the Registration of Chinese Government Scholarship Students in 2025/2026 Academic Year Beihang University Dear Chinese Government Scholarship students,According to the regulations of China Scholarship Council, All Chinese government scholarship students who register on campus in the 2025/2026 academic year are required to complete the annual registration.
